app_title: The Sound of Essentials: Rhythm Quest

footer.tagline: Designed for the developing brain, not the algorithm.
footer.weekly_activities: Weekly neuro-affirming activities and music drops.

home.hero_subtitle: A scientifically grounded, music-driven ecosystem for early childhood development. Calm. Focused. Essential.
home.hero_note: For children ages 2–8 · Grounded in neuroscience
home.why_title_1: We are turning a State of Emergency
home.why_title_2: back into The Sound of Essentials: Rhythm Quest.
home.why_subtitle: 300 million children worldwide cannot read proficiently.
home.stat_3_lab: Neural connections formed per second in the first 1,000 days
home.approach_subtitle: Every element of SOE is engineered to protect and nurture the developing brain through the universal language of music.
home.curriculum_subtitle: Every lesson weaves through all five developmental domains.
home.cta_title: Biology doesn't wait for systems to fix themselves.

language.title: Language
language.desc: Phonics, vocabulary, and communication through song and rhythm.

cognitive.title: Cognitive
cognitive.desc: Pattern recognition, memory, and problem-solving through musical play.

physical.title: Physical
physical.desc: Motor skills and body awareness through movement and dance.

science.title: Science
science.desc: Nature, anatomy, and discovery through sensory exploration.

social_emotional.title: Social-Emotional
social_emotional.desc: Manners, empathy, and self-regulation through collaborative music.

active.title: Active, Not Passive
active.subtitle: Teacher-in-a-Box
active.desc: Every episode is a structured lesson—not a distraction.

neuro.title: Neuro-Affirming
neuro.subtitle: Calm by Design
neuro.desc: Slow pacing, ASMR-focused audio design, and intentional silence.

scalable.title: Globally Scalable
scalable.subtitle: No Teacher Required
scalable.desc: Built for the 44 million teacher deficit.

universe.hero_subtitle: Guided by Seriphia, an Eternal Learning Mother.
universe.seriphia_desc_1: Seriphia is the radiant guardian who oversees all seven lands.
universe.map_subtitle: Each land represents a critical domain of early childhood learning.
universe.science_subtitle: SOE's curriculum is built on three globally recognized methodologies.

Harmonia.desc: In the Land of Harmonia, Kenji and Aiko discover that words carry music.

Numeria.desc: Kwame and Octavia navigate the rhythmic world of Numeria.

Vitalis.desc: Felix and Amara move through Vitalis.

Chronia.desc: In Chronia, Elias and Selene learn the rhythms of time.

Lexiconia.desc: Ronan and Nerissa tackle hard words and complex sounds in Lexiconia.

Geometria.desc: Silas and Vesta explore the geometric landscapes of Geometria.

Natura.desc: Ezra and Athena dive into Natura.

Orff.name: Orff Schulwerk
Orff.desc: Active music-making through speech, rhythm, and instruments.

Kodaly.name: Kodály Method
Kodaly.desc: Developing inner hearing through singing, hand signs, and folk music.

heroes.hero_subtitle: 15 heroes across 7 lands — each one a guide through a critical domain of early childhood learning. Every child finds themselves in at least one character.
heroes.cta_subtitle: Join the movement and help bring music-driven learning to every child.

Wisdom.name: Wisdom
Wisdom.desc: The ability to apply knowledge with deep understanding.

Patience.name: Patience
Patience.desc: Remaining calm and steady, giving each child the time they need.

Nurturing.name: Nurturing
Nurturing.desc: Providing warmth, care, and emotional safety.

Creative.name: Creative
Creative.desc: Thinking beyond the obvious — finding new connections between ideas, sounds, and stories.

Curious.name: Curious
Curious.desc: A deep desire to explore, question, and discover.

Respectful.name: Respectful
Respectful.desc: Treating every person and idea with dignity.

Empathetic.name: Empathetic
Empathetic.desc: The ability to feel what others feel.

Kind.name: Kind
Kind.desc: Acting with genuine care and consideration.

Analytical.name: Analytical
Analytical.desc: Breaking problems into parts to understand how they work.

Rhythmic.name: Rhythmic
Rhythmic.desc: A natural sense of pattern, timing, and flow.

Playful.name: Playful
Playful.desc: Approaching learning with joy, humor, and a sense of adventure.

Energetic.name: Energetic
Energetic.desc: Bringing vitality and enthusiasm to every activity.

Encouraging.name: Encouraging
Encouraging.desc: Lifting others up with words and actions.

Wise.name: Wise
Wise.desc: Combining knowledge with experience to guide others.

Intuitive.name: Intuitive
Intuitive.desc: Sensing what is needed before it is spoken.

Reflective.name: Reflective
Reflective.desc: Taking time to look inward and learn from experience.

Spatial.name: Spatial
Spatial.desc: Understanding how objects relate in space.

Methodical.name: Methodical
Methodical.desc: Working step by step with care and order.

Gentle.name: Gentle
Gentle.desc: Approaching the world with softness and care.

Seriphia.title: An Eternal Learning Mother
Seriphia.bio: Seriphia is the radiant guardian who oversees all seven lands.

Kenji.title: The Word Musician
Kenji.bio: Kenji discovers that every word carries a melody.

Aiko.title: The Harmony Keeper
Aiko.bio: Aiko brings harmony to every conversation.

Kwame.title: The Rhythm Counter
Kwame.bio: Kwame hears numbers in every beat.

Felix.title: The Movement Master
Felix.bio: Felix moves through Vitalis with boundless energy.

Amara.title: The Dance Guide
Amara.bio: Amara knows that the body is the first instrument.

Elias.title: The Time Keeper
Elias.bio: Elias understands the rhythm of time itself.

Selene.title: The Season Singer
Selene.bio: Selene sings the songs of seasons.

Ronan.title: The Word Warrior
Ronan.bio: Ronan tackles the hardest words with courage.

Nerissa.title: The Sound Sculptor
Nerissa.bio: Nerissa sculpts difficult sounds into beautiful words.

Vesta.title: The Space Navigator
Vesta.bio: Vesta navigates the geometric landscapes with confidence.

Ezra.title: The Nature Listener
Ezra.bio: Ezra listens to what nature has to teach.

Athena.title: The Discovery Sage
Athena.bio: Athena brings the wisdom of the natural world to every child.

science.hero_subtitle: Chronicles of the Clock: Understanding the neurological architecture behind every rhythm.
science.track_title: Do You Know What Time It Is?
science.beyond_desc_1: It may seem just like lyrics to a catchy song, but dive deeper and you'll see a brilliantly disguised lesson in Temporal Scaffolding and Numeracy.
science.beyond_desc_2: This track is a vital addition to Celestia: The Garden of Time, where our heroes Elias & Selene guide children through abstract concepts.
science.breakdown_subtitle: Every element of the SOE curriculum is designed to support neurological development and executive function.

sequencing.title: Rhythmic Sequencing
sequencing.desc: By distinctly separating whole hours from half-hours, we introduce fractional concepts and sequential logic.

anchoring.title: Anchoring Abstract Concepts
anchoring.desc: Time is invisible and difficult for toddlers to grasp. We solve this by linking abstract numbers to concrete, physical anchors.

regulation.title: Emotional Regulation
regulation.desc: Unpredictability creates anxiety. Mapping the day builds Executive Function.

science.implementation_desc_1: In our "Teacher's Guide" or interactive website, we pair this song with a visual "daily routine chart."
science.implementation_desc_2: Parents and educators point to a clock face during the numbers. This physical "serve and return" interaction permanently cements the learning.
science.cta_subtitle: Experience how these neurological principles translate into joyful melody.

join.hero_subtitle: Whether you're a parent, educator, community leader, or impact investor—there's a place for you in The Sound of Essentials: Rhythm Quest movement.
join.newsletter_desc: Get weekly neuro-affirming activities, exclusive music drops, and updates on the Rhythm Quest journey—delivered straight to your inbox.
join.welcome_desc: Thank you for joining. Your first drop is on its way.
join.email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
join.org_email_error: Please enter a valid organization email.
join.no_spam: No spam. Just calm, essential content. Unsubscribe anytime.
join.audience_1_desc: Seeking safe, intentional screen-time alternatives? SOE transforms passive media into active developmental experiences. Subscribe for weekly activities you can do at home.
join.audience_2_desc: Looking for a scalable curriculum? Our "Teacher-in-a-Box" model lets you deploy SOE in your classroom, community center, or micro-franchise with zero specialized training.
join.audience_3_desc: Funding solutions for the global early education crisis? SOE is built for impact at scale—music-driven intervention that works where traditional infrastructure cannot reach.
join.partnerships_subtitle: Schools, NGOs, investors, and community organizations—reach out to explore how the SOE micro-franchise model can serve your community.
join.partnership_thank_you: Thank you for your interest in partnering with SOE. Our team will respond within 48 hours.
join.placeholder_message: Tell us about your community, your goals, and how SOE can help.
join.mission_subtitle: Step into the Media Room and hear the essentials for yourself.

assistant.title: Research Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask about the pedagogy, neurological architecture, or project goals.
assistant.empty_state: “How does rhythmic sequencing support executive function?”
assistant.error_conn: Wait, Elias is checking the clock... (Connection failed. Please check your API key or connection).
assistant.error_key: Perplexity API Key is missing in .env. Please add VITE_PERPLEXITY_API_KEY.
assistant.system_prompt: You are a research assistant for Flavor Codes and The Sound of Essentials. You analyze the neurological architecture, pedagogy, and strategic implementation of music-driven developmental tools. Be insightful, encouraging, and highly detailed.

media.hero_subtitle: Music, stories, and visual learning from the seven lands of Rhythm Quest.
media.audio_subtitle: Seven lands, seven sounds — each track a guided lesson in disguise.
media.coloring_subtitle: High-resolution pages from the SOE Coloring Book — print, color, and learn.
media.read_subtitle: Follow Seriphia and the heroes through the Rhythm Quest Storybook — page by page.
media.no_lyrics: No lyrics available for this track.

1.title: Sunny Day (Intro)
1.desc: A gentle sunrise melody that welcomes learners to the world of SOE.

2.title: Days of the Week
2.desc: Elias & Selene sing the seven days, building temporal sequencing skills.

3.title: Alphabet Song Remix
3.desc: Kenji & Aiko bring the ABCs to life with a rhythmic phonics remix.

4.title: Horses Interlude
4.desc: A playful spoken-word journey through the animal kingdom, guided by humor.

5.title: Le Cheval
5.desc: A bilingual French-English tribute to the power and grace of the horse.

6.title: Let's Stretch
6.desc: Felix & Amara lead a full-body breathing and stretching routine.

7.title: Drill Time
7.desc: A motivating march and movement drill set to a rhythmic call-and-response chant.

8.title: Numbers
8.desc: Kwame & Octavia count to 10 with claps — hands-on numeracy in action.

9.title: My Body
9.desc: Athena & Ezra guide learners through the anatomy of the human body.

10.title: Manners
10.desc: Aiko teaches the language of courtesy — please, thank you, excuse me.

11.title: Do You Know What Time It Is?
11.desc: Elias & Selene introduce clock-reading, half-hours, and daily routines.

12.title: Changes
12.desc: Nerissa reflects on the changing weather and the constancy of love.

13.title: One Hundred
13.desc: Octavia counts all the way to 100 — a milestone in early numeracy.

14.title: The Ocean
14.desc: An immersive sound journey exploring the wonders of the ocean.

15.title: Hard Words
15.desc: Ronan & Nerissa tackle multi-syllabic vocabulary with rhythmic articulation drills.

16.title: Shapes
16.desc: Silas & Vesta sing about circles, squares, triangles, and beyond.

17.title: Months of the Year
17.desc: Elias guides a full calendar recitation set to a memorable melody.

18.title: Rain
18.desc: Athena & Ezra explore the water cycle and the beauty of rainfall.

19.title: After the Storm (Outro)
19.desc: A calm closing track — a promise that light always follows the storm.
